prompt: Using the provided reference image as the woman’s identity and hair reference, transform her from the casual photo collage into a polished commercial poster for Aguardiente Amarillo. Replace the original outfit with a monochrome cream-white fashion look: loose long-sleeve top, wide-leg trousers, and white sneakers. Put her in a clean side-profile full-body pose, leaning back with both hands in her pockets so that her back rests against an oversized tilted liquor bottle placed to her left. Create a bold studio advertising composition with a saturated golden-yellow background and glossy reflective floor. Add one giant bottle of Aguardiente Amarillo de Manzanares, highly realistic, angled diagonally, with legible branded label details in Spanish. Behind the subject and bottle, add the single oversized vertical word “AGUARDIENTE” in very tall condensed white letters spanning nearly the full height of the frame. Add the small top-right credit text “Creado por @HMontilla_”. Add a bottom-centered 3-line white caption that reads: “El Aguardiente Amarillo de Manzanares es un icónico licor colombiano, originario de 1885 en Manzanares, Caldas.” Keep the woman’s long dark hair and overall facial structure consistent with the reference while upgrading the image to a premium editorial product-ad look with dramatic warm lighting, crisp shadows, and realistic reflections.
